PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT

This Partnership Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of March 15, 2025, by and between:

1. Robert J. Whitfield, an individual residing at 4521 Harbor View Drive, Newport Beach, CA 92660 ("Partner A"), and
2. Greenleaf Industries, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company with principal offices at 890 Commerce Boulevard, Suite 400, Austin, TX 78701, represented by its Managing Member, Patricia Chen ("Partner B").

RECITALS

WHEREAS, the Parties wish to establish a joint venture under the name "Pacific Horizon Ventures" for the purpose of developing and commercializing advanced wireless networking equipment;

WHEREAS, Partner A shall contribute $2,500,000 in initial capital, representing a 60% ownership interest;

WHEREAS, Partner B shall contribute intellectual property valued at $1,666,667, representing a 40% ownership interest;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants contained herein, the Parties agree as follows:

1. FORMATION AND NAME
The partnership shall be known as "Pacific Horizon Ventures" and shall be registered in the State of California, County of Orange, Case No. 2025-CV-44821.

2. TERM
This Agreement shall commence on March 15, 2025 and continue for a period of ten (10) years unless earlier terminated.

3. CAPITAL CONTRIBUTIONS
(a) Partner A shall contribute $2,500,000 within thirty (30) days of execution.
(b) Partner B shall contribute all rights to Patent No. US-2024-0891234.
(c) Additional capital calls require unanimous consent.

4. PROFIT DISTRIBUTION
Profits shall be distributed quarterly as follows:
- First $500,000 annually: 70/30 in favor of Partner A
- Amounts exceeding $500,000: 55/45 in favor of Partner A

5. MANAGEMENT
Day-to-day operations managed by Patricia Chen (COO).
Financial oversight by Robert Whitfield.
Major decisions (>$100,000) require both partners.

6. CONTACT INFORMATION
Partner A: robert.whitfield@pacifichorizon.com, (949) 555-0142
Partner B: patricia.chen@greenleafindustries.com, (512) 555-0198
Legal Counsel: Morrison & Associates, (213) 555-0167

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.

_________________________
Robert J. Whitfield
SSN: 487-23-9156

_________________________
Patricia Chen, Managing Member
Greenleaf Industries, LLC
EIN: 84-7291035
